CIPHER.381.cipherString: This flavor made me fly across the universe, it was as if there was another level of existence embedded in it.
CIPHER.381.question: A quote by Poncho Civeira has been encoded as an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.381.author: Poncho Civeira

CIPHER.388.cipherString: Whenever you throw away what's right for what's convenient, you end up losing both.
CIPHER.388.question: A mysterious postcard arrives from an unknown sender. It contains a coded quote by Harry Turtledove, written in an Atbash. What does it say?
CIPHER.388.author: Harry Turtledove

CIPHER.382.question: This string of symbols appears on the display of a malfunctioning calculator. It hides a quote, encoded as a Cryptarithm. What do the values 3265 924 18260 decode to?

CIPHER.389.cipherString: Some people are always grumbling because roses have thorns. I am thankful that thorns have roses.
CIPHER.389.question: While walking in a garden, you spotted the following letters carved into the base of a sundial. You think it's a quote by Alphonse Karr encoded as a K1 Aristocrat Cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.389.author: Alphonse Karr

CIPHER.383.cipherString: The movies were custard compared to politics.
CIPHER.383.question: A fragment of text is discovered in a time capsule from 1985. It's a quote by Nancy Reagan encrypted as a Baconian. What does it say?
CIPHER.383.author: Nancy Reagan

CIPHER.384.cipherString: The best teachers are those who show you where to look, but don't tell you what to see.
CIPHER.384.question: Your lab partner discovered this pattern on the back of a graphing calculator. It's a quote, encoded as a Checkerboard with a polybius key of PROFESSORSHIP. What does it say?

CIPHER.385.cipherString: I think time stands quite still and we move around in it, sometimes slowly and sometimes at a furious rate.
CIPHER.385.question: During a field trip, you notice these strange markings on a metal plaque in a physics building. They represent a quote by Marlen Haushofer, encoded using a K1 Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.385.author: Marlen Haushofer

CIPHER.386.question: A message flashes briefly on a malfunctioning computer screen. It turns out to be a quote written in a Cryptarithm. What do the values 95 05374573 2746 decode to?

CIPHER.387.cipherString: Este espléndido volumen incluye información exclusiva y nunca vista hasta ahora, como la cronología oficial de la saga.
CIPHER.387.question: This quote comes from the description of the Spanish-language book The Legend of Zelda: Hyrule Historia. It has been encoded using the Xenocrypt Cipher using a K1 alphabet with an English keyword. What does it say?

CIPHER.390.cipherString: In the spring, at the end of the day, you should smell like dirt.
CIPHER.390.question: While walking in the woods, you noticed that a woodpecker had pecked out the following letters on a tree. You recognize it as a saying by Margaret Atwood, encoded as a Fractionated Morse cipher. The first two words are IN THE. What does it say?
CIPHER.390.author: Margaret Atwood

CIPHER.391.cipherString: If heredity were not overwhelmingly more important than environment, you could teach calculus to a horse.
CIPHER.391.question: A message was left on the whiteboard after science club. It's a quote encoded as an Aristocrat. What does it say?

CIPHER.392.cipherString: Science is the process of obscuring the marvelous with explanations.
CIPHER.392.question: This coded passage was discovered in the margin of a physics exam from years ago. It's a quote by James Rozoff, encrypted as a Porta using a keyword of EUREKA. What does it say?
CIPHER.392.author: James Rozoff

CIPHER.393.cipherString: Spider-Man has been unmasked in all his last four films. If I was him, I wouldn't even bother dressing up.
CIPHER.393.question: This quote about movies has been encoded as a random Aristocrat cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.393.author: Unknown

CIPHER.394.cipherString: Shared danger is the strongest of bonds; it will keep men united in spite of mutual dislike and suspicion.
CIPHER.394.question: Upon searching a room, the following were found on scraps of paper. You are told it's a quote encoded as a Caesar cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.394.author: Livy

CIPHER.395.cipherString: It was the twilight of the iguana.
CIPHER.395.question: A coded message appears after you shine a UV light on an aquarium. It turns out to be a quote by Canto General, encrypted using an Affine with a=15 and b=12. What does it say?
CIPHER.395.author: Canto General

CIPHER.396.cipherString: Facts didn't matter to people if they were smiling.
CIPHER.396.question: You stumble across this encoded text on an old floppy disk labeled “Project Discovery.” It's a quote by Nick Oliveri in a Baconian cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.396.author: Nick Oliveri

CIPHER.397.cipherString: Loyalty and friendship, which is to me the same, created all the wealth that I've ever thought I'd have.
CIPHER.397.question: You open a forgotten email draft saved in the school's computer system. It holds a quote by Ernie Banks encoded in an Aristocrat cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.397.author: Ernie Banks

CIPHER.398.cipherString: Think in the morning. Act in the noon. Eat in the evening. Sleep in the night.
CIPHER.398.question: Some life advice by William Blake has been encoded as a Complete Columnar cipher. You are told that the advice contains ACT. What does it say?
CIPHER.398.author: William Blake

CIPHER.399.cipherString: I always enjoyed the hearty society of a snowstorm.
CIPHER.399.question: Solve this quote by John Muir that has been encoded using the Nihilist Substitution Cipher with a keyword of WHITE and polybius key of PRECIPITATION. What does it say?
CIPHER.399.author: John Muir

CIPHER.400.cipherString: How can they say my life is not a success? Have I not for more than sixty years got enough to eat and escaped being eaten?
CIPHER.400.question: An explorer's journal mentions a “hidden truth” encoded below. It turns out to be a quote by Logan Pearsall Smith, written in a Patristocrat using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher contains SIXTY, corresponding to the ciphertext letters MGPNQ. What does it say?
CIPHER.400.author: Logan Pearsall Smith

CIPHER.401.cipherString: I don't care what the editor likes or dislikes, I care what the people like.
CIPHER.401.question: A note falls out of a borrowed library book. The message is a quote by Mickey Spillane, written in a Checkerboard with a polybius key of PERIODICAL. What does it say?
CIPHER.401.author: Mickey Spillane

CIPHER.402.cipherString: Sometimes you hold on to things, not because you want to keep them, but because they are difficult to let go.
CIPHER.402.question: Projected by a broken laser pointer during physics class, solve this K1 Aristocrat quote from Phaedra Patrick. What does it say?
CIPHER.402.author: Phaedra Patrick

CIPHER.403.cipherString: Music is the space between the notes.
CIPHER.403.question: Etched into the surface of a melted vinyl record, you found this Baconian-encrypted quote by Claude Debussy. You are told that the deciphered text ends with otes. What does it say?
CIPHER.403.author: Claude Debussy

CIPHER.404.cipherString: It is by attempting to reach the top with a single leap that so much misery is produced in the world.
CIPHER.404.question: You find the following observation by Cobbett embroidered onto a flag on a mountain peak. It has been encoded as an Aristocrat cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.404.author: Cobbett

CIPHER.405.cipherString: I really think that the drums are as poetic and romantic as any instrument.
CIPHER.405.question: The marching band's sheet music rearranged itself into this Complete Columnar pattern—it's a quote by Tony Williams. The quote has ROMANTIC somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.405.author: Tony Williams

CIPHER.406.cipherString: You will do foolish things, but do them with enthusiasm.
CIPHER.406.question: You find an encoded message in the test tube rack, written on masking tape. It's a quote by Paulo Coelho, written in a Fractionated Morse. You are told that the quote has FOOL in it corresponding to the encoded text X T V M J T L, meaning J = ––×; L = ●×●; M = –×–; T = ●–●; V = ×––; X = ××●. What does it say?
CIPHER.406.author: Paulo Coelho
